reason: Verified that the agent successfully opens a browser, navigates to https://example.com, and returns the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully, displaying the Super Agent interface with three agents listed in the sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260424-204327-8p0h" agent in the sidebar — the agent chat interface opened showing the message input area and configuration options
Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — message was successfully entered and sent button became enabled
Agent began processing the request — status changed to "working" and a "Browser Page Title Retrieval" task appeared in the sidebar with a live browser preview panel showing the Example Domain page
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — agent completed the task in 7 seconds and returned the response: "The page title is \"Example Domain\"."

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — the response clearly displays the text "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." as required, with browser operations showing successful "Open Browser" and "Browser Command $ get title" actions
